name: pancreas_tumor_seg
description: Pancreas + tumor CT segmentation using MONAI's DiNTS (pancreas_ct_dints_segmentation bundle, NAS-discovered architecture). Accepts a 3D abdominal CT NIfTI and returns a 3-class mask (background / pancreas / tumor).

help.summary: Pancreas and tumor CT segmentation (3 classes) using MONAI DiNTS.
notes: Requires a 3D abdominal CT NIfTI volume.

runtime.notes: Requires GPU for DiNTS 3D sliding-window inference.
